title: Xbox withdraws funding from IO Interactive's RPG Project Fantasy and causes layoffs
summary: Publisher Xbox abandoned IO Interactive's project, leading the studio to lay off staff and raising doubts about the game's future.

title: Microsoft considers closing Arkane Studios and canceling Marvel's Blade
summary: According to multiple reports, Microsoft plans to close the Dishonored studio and halt development of the Blade game.

title: Splatoon Raiders captures press attention with its new features and cooperative mode
summary: Nintendo's new shooter receives a wealth of previews and details about its gameplay, customization, and multiplayer options.

title: Oblivion Remastered will come to Nintendo Switch 2 with a physical edition in August
summary: Bethesda confirmed the launch of the Oblivion remaster for Switch 2, which will include a physical version with the full game on cartridge.

title: Guns of Eschaton, Viktor Antonov's last game, announced for PC and consoles
summary: The legendary art director of Half-Life 2 left as a legacy a western soulslike shooter coming soon.

title: Several developers decline to make Baldur's Gate 4 due to the pressure of surpassing BG3
summary: Figures such as the original designer of Baldur's Gate and the director of Exodus declined Hasbro's offer to avoid competing with Larian's success.

title: Valve details the challenges and features of the new Steam Machine
summary: Valve's console receives technical analysis and statements about its design, performance, and component supply.

title: The ESA declares community servers for Minecraft and Call of Duty illegal
summary: The video game association sparked controversy by stating that private servers are piracy during a government hearing.

title: Rockstar developers push for union recognition ahead of GTA 6
summary: Rockstar workers are seeking formal unionization ahead of the potential release of GTA 6 and following recent layoffs.

title: Xbox faces a crisis of cuts and internal restructuring
summary: Microsoft is experiencing a period of job uncertainty with mass layoffs, cancellations, and a drop in team morale.

title: Xbox assures Kojima's horror game is safe from cuts
summary: Despite layoffs and cancellations, Xbox continues to support Kojima Productions' OD project.

title: Turok: Origins showcases its gameplay in a new trailer
summary: The return of the Turok saga is revealed in a preview showing its action and renewed graphics.

title: GTA 6 dominates pre-orders and sparks debate over its $80 price
summary: Rockstar's anticipated game tops pre-order lists worldwide, and analysts discuss whether it will normalize games at $80.

title: Godot bans contributions of AI-generated code
summary: The open-source game engine requires developers to declare if they used AI to write code, citing trust issues.

title: Love and Deepspace cancels its new werewolf love interest after controversy
summary: The mobile game removed the planned character after fans sent complaints and even cow dung to the studio.

title: Eremite develops a survival game set in the world of Against the Storm
summary: The studio behind the popular city-builder revealed that its next project will be a survival game in the same universe.

title: Mario Kart World updates to version 1.7.0 with new competitions
summary: Nintendo released a patch for Mario Kart World that adds new features such as Knockout Tour rallies and general improvements.

title: Nivalis Nights will launch on September 29 with a new name
summary: The cyberpunk life simulator changes its name and release date for this fall.

title: Dragon Age writer describes generative AI as a virulent plague
summary: David Gaider warns that the use of artificial intelligence in game development is harmful and should be treated as a disease.

title: Ubisoft Barcelona studio goes on strike over mass layoffs
summary: Ubisoft Barcelona workers protest against the dismissal of 51 employees in the latest round of cuts by the publisher.
